---
name: Documentation or Cleanup Request
about: Propose improvements to README, inline code comments, or code formatting.
title: '[DOCS/CLEANUP] - <Brief Description>'
assignees: ''
---

### Type of Improvement
<!-- Select all that apply -->
- [ ] README or external documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring / clearing technical debt
- [ ] Adding inline code comments or docstrings for mlProject components/pipelines
- [ ] Fixing broken setup steps or prerequisites

### Describe the Area of Improvement
<!-- Which files or folders need work? -->
A clear description of what section of the codebase needs cleaning up or documenting (e.g., `src/mlProject/components/`, `dvc.yaml`, `app.py`, etc.).

### Why this is helpful
<!-- Do not exaggerate, use simple langauge -->
Explain how this will help future GSSoC contributors or make the MLOps Red Wine Quality Prediction pipeline easier to maintain.
